childhood.familyBackground: Born January 7, 1949. Full name is Babasaheb Neelkanth Kalyani. Son of Neelakanth Rao Kalyani, tech entrepreneur.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 1949년 1월 7일 출생. 전명 Babasaheb Neelkanth Kalyani. 기술 기업가 Neelakanth Rao Kalyani의 아들.
childhood.education: BITS Pilani - BE (Hons.) in Mechanical Engineering (1970), MIT - MS degree
childhood.educationKo: BITS 필라니 - 기계공학 학사(1970), MIT - 석사 학위
childhood.earlyLife: Graduated with engineering degree. Joined family company Bharat Forge to lead turnaround and modernization.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 공학 학위로 졸업. 가족 회사 Bharat Forge에 입사하여 구조 조정 및 현대화 주도.

careerTimeline.event: Graduated from BITS Pilani with BE in Mechanical Engineering
Joined Bharat Forge as second-generation family business leader
careerTimeline.eventKo: 2세대 가족 사업 리더로 Bharat Forge 입사

careerTimeline.event: Transformed Bharat Forge into global forging powerhouse
careerTimeline.eventKo: Bharat Forge를 글로벌 위조 강자로 변환

careerTimeline.event: Expanded operations to 5 continents with manufacturing in major markets
careerTimeline.eventKo: 5개 대륙으로 운영 확장, 주요 시장에 제조 시설

personalTraits.knownFor: Building Bharat Forge into world's second-largest forging company, aerospace and defense expertise
personalTraits.knownForKo: Bharat Forge를 세계 2번째 위조 회사로 구축, 항공우주 및 방위 전문성
personalTraits.philanthropy: Founder-chairman of Pratham Pune Education Foundation supporting underprivileged children education
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: Pratham Pune 교육 재단 창립-의장, 취약계층 어린이 교육 지원
